_note: collides 는 요청 레이아웃 기준 후보 플래그. 실물 확인 후 core-coder 와 조율.

generation.prompt: Painterly cel-shaded 2D top-down fantasy RPG art, faded pastel palette, soft rim light and gentle cel-shading, atmospheric fog with aerial perspective, melancholic lonely wistful-wonder mood. Slightly-tilted bird's-eye top-down view for a tile-based game. Muted, low-saturation colors only, no bright primary colors, no glossy or neon highlights. Original dark-fantasy world, not based on any existing franchise. Seamless 48px grid tiles, top-down projection, matte painterly texture, muted palette. Chapter mood: the Ashen Spire, the climax of ruin and self-denial, deep grey and shadow-plum with faint low-saturation ember-red embers, drifting ash instead of fog, the darkest heaviest chapter, no bright flame. Top-down RPG terrain tileset in a strict 4x4 grid of 16 seamless square tiles, filled edge-to-edge, tileable seamless edges, read left-to-right top-to-bottom in this exact order. Row 1: ash-dusted dark stone floor, ashier floor variant, cracked stone floor, dark slate tile. Row 2: stone stair step, stair landing platform, dark spire wall block, cracked spire wall block. Row 3: iron brazier with faint low-saturation ember glow, pile of rubble, broken toppled pillar, iron railing. Row 4: drifting ash on ground, dark stone with an engraved erased name, black scorch mark on stone, dark bottomless pit. Consistent dim ember-tinged lighting across all tiles, no labels, no numbers, no grid lines, no text.

_seamless_regen.reason: art-director tiling review — base terrain tiles regenerated seamless (center-glow removed, flat low-contrast lighting, edge-wrap blended)
_seamless_regen.note: 그리드/index/collision/dims 불변, 해당 셀 픽셀만 교체
